mapper.sql: id, user_id, application_details, supporting_documents, status, reviewer_id, reviewed_at, comments
mapper.select: SELECT FROM positive_member_application WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT FROM positive_member_application ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO positive_member_application (user_id, application_details, supporting_documents, status, reviewer_id, reviewed_at, comments) VALUES (#{userId}, #{applicationDetails}, #{supportingDocuments}, #{status}, #{reviewerId}, #{reviewedAt}, #{comments})
mapper.update: UPDATE positive_member_application SET application_details = #{applicationDetails}, supporting_documents = #{supportingDocuments}, status = #{status}, reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}, reviewed_at = #{reviewedAt}, comments = #{comments} WHERE id = #{id}
